zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Vernon於1298年出生在英國維爾爾時，她的父親Richard de Vernon44歲，母親Juliana de Vesci48歲。她和William de Stourton至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1374年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾利其費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Vernon于1298年出生在英国維爾爾时，她的父亲Richard de Vernon44岁，母亲Juliana de Vesci48岁。她和William de Stourton至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1374年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾利其費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Vernon was born in 1298, in Wiltshire, England, her father, Richard de Vernon, was 44 and her mother, Juliana de Vesci, was 48. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with William de Stourton. She died in 1374, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Litchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Vernon est née en 1298, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Vernon, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Vesci, avait 48 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec William de Stourton. Elle est décédée en 1374, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Litchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Vernon 1298 in Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Vernon 44 und ihre Mutter Juliana de Vesci 48. Sie hatte mit William de Stourton mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1374 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Litchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Vernon è nata il nel 1298 nel Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Richard de Vernon, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Juliana de Vesci, aveva 48 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con William de Stourton. Morì nel 1374, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Litchfield, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Vernonが1298年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard de Vernonは44歳，母Juliana de Vesciは48歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Stourtonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1374年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアリトチフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Vernon(이)가 1298년 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Vernon(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana de Vesci(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 William de Stourton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 리트ch필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Vernon nasceu em 1298, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Vernon, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Vesci, tinha 48 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com William de Stourton. Ela faleceu em 1374, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Litchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Vernon родилась в 1298 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Vernon было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Vesci, 48. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от William de Stourton. Она умерла в 1374 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности личфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Vernon nació en 1298, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Vernon, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Juliana de Vesci, tenía 48 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con William de Stourton. Murió en 1374, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Litchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
